name: KASUMI BUNSHIN NO JUTSU (MIST REPLICATION TECHNIQUE)

description.value:
This forbidden technique creates a single mist clone, made from water vapor charged with Chakra. Each clone appears within the source it is created from. Statistics: Mist clones apply the following:

- Their maximum HP equals ¼ your character level
- They have a clumsy flight speed equal to half your base land speed
- They take a -5 penalty to attack rolls
- They do not gain any armor bonus to Defense
- They take a -2 penalty to saving throws
- They have wind resistance 5

Mist clones have a 20% chance to be completely unaffected when hit by an attack dealing ballistic, bludgeoning, piercing or slashing damage, unless the attack can hit incorporeal creatures.

Upon contact with fire of any kind, a mist clone immediately evaporates as if killed or dismissed.

Defeat and Dismissal: A mist clone evaporates completely, leaving behind no trace of its existence when defeated or dismissed.

Empower: Spend 2 Chakra per clone to create additional clones. You can control a maximum of 1 mist clone per three character levels.

Mastery: The fifth step improves the clones' flight speed to equal your base land speed, with poor maneuverability.
